chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-47 of 2026 (Aizaz Waseem v. Mst. Shah Taj Waheed and another) ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.232 of 2026 2. For orders on office objection Nos.2,3 & 6 & Reply of Counsel thereof as Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.233 of 2026 4. For hearing of main case 19.01.2026 Mr. Raj Ali Wahid Kunwar and Ms. Pia Ali, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Irshad Ali, Assistant Attorney General --------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Instant petition is directed against the order dated 19.12.2025 passed by the learned XIIth Additional District Judge Karachi South in Guardian and Ward Appeal No.212 of 2025 (Aizaz Waseem v. lerned Family Judge XVI and others) as well as the order dated 23.10.2025 passed by the learned XVIth Family Judge in Guardian & Ward Application No.110 of 2025, whereby G&W Appeal filed by the petitioner for grant of permission for issuance of the passport for minors Sheikh Muhammad Mustafa and Eshaal Aziz was turned down. Learned AAG present in Court in other matters waives notice. It is quite surprising to learn that both the Courts below have turned down a request for the issuance of the passport to the minors, which otherwise was not in any way infringing the rights of any of the parties. Issuance of the passport to the minors was their right; even for that reason, hearing of the other side was necessary. Since the learned AAG has waived notice, this petition is, therefore, allowed. At this stage, Passport Office is directed to issue passports to minors Sheikh Muhammad Mustafa and Eshaal Aziz, as and when they appear by adopting due process of law.

Since the learned AAG has waived notice, this petition is, therefore, allowed. At this stage, Passport Office is directed to issue passports to minors Sheikh Muhammad Mustafa and Eshaal Aziz, as and when they appear by adopting due process of law. JUDGE Nadir*
